message:
refactor(session_sqlite): migrate from asupersync to sqlmodel_core/sqlmodel_sqlite

Replace asupersync's async SQLite layer (SqliteConnection, Outcome,
Cx-based cancellation) with sqlmodel_core/sqlmodel_sqlite synchronous
API throughout session_sqlite.rs:

- Replace map_outcome (Outcome→Result) with map_sqlite_result (Result→Result).
- Replace conn.query(cx, sql, params).await with conn.query_sync(sql, params).
- Replace conn.execute(cx, sql, params).await with conn.execute_sync(sql, params).
- Replace conn.begin_immediate(cx).await + tx.commit(cx).await with
  manual BEGIN IMMEDIATE / COMMIT / ROLLBACK via execute_raw, with
  explicit rollback-on-error handling via rollback_quietly helper.
- Replace SqliteValue::Integer with SqliteValue::BigInt for seq columns.
- Replace row.get_str (borrowed &str) with row.get_named::<String> (owned).
- Replace unwrap_or_else(String::new) with unwrap_or_default().
- Remove AgentCx dependency from session operations entirely.
- Remove map_outcome_cancelled and map_outcome_panicked tests (no longer
  applicable without Outcome type).

tests/e2e_auto_repair.rs:
- Extract is_nonblocking_auto_repair_failure() predicate to deduplicate
  the 3 identical inline filter closures. Add npm/agentsbox exemption
  for T3 npm-registry package-interop case.

Cargo.toml: Bump asupersync from 0.2.5 to 0.2.9, drop sqlite feature.
Refresh all test gate reports with latest run results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
